_comment: English translations for the admin Products area.

extras.title: Extras & options

kindHint.mandatory: Always applied to every booking. The customer sees them but cannot remove them.
kindHint.optional: The customer chooses whether to add them via a checkbox.

extras.emptyList: No items yet. Add one below.

radio.groupHint: Group {{group}} — the customer picks exactly one alternative below.
radio.emptyHint: No radio groups yet. Create one above (e.g. "insurance") to get started.

options.title: Service options
options.subtitle: The customer picks exactly one (radio).
options.emptyHint: No options yet. Add at least one to enable the radio picker at checkout.

row.descriptionPlaceholder: E.g. Ideal for an initial assessment

row.placeholderPlaceholder: Example text shown inside the input

form.stockHint: Leave empty to skip stock tracking

course.emptyDescFirst: Create your first video course to get started.

publishBlocker.noLessons: Add at least one lesson before publishing
publishBlocker.noVideos: Link at least one Bunny video before publishing

broken.title: The course product is not linked to any content.

bunny.errorTitle: Bunny configuration issue — click to check

event.title: Events
event.subtitle: Manage all your events, dates and check-in in a single view.
event.emptyDescFirst: Create your first event to start selling online.
event.emptyDescPast: There are no past events to show.

common.termsHint: If empty, the store's terms are used. Markdown supported.

tabs.editHint: Course data, modules, lessons, sales, Bunny
tabs.usersHint: Who has purchased and is following the course

basics.slugHint: Lowercase, digits and hyphens. Visible in the public URL. Unique for your store.
basics.shortDescPlaceholder: A sentence describing the course (visible in the catalog).
basics.longDescPlaceholder: What you will learn, who it is for, prerequisites, etc.

lesson.previewToggle: Show as free preview on the landing

modules.onboardingTitle: Build the course module by module
modules.onboardingStep1: 1️⃣ Start with the title of the first module below
modules.onboardingStep2: 2️⃣ Inside the module add lessons (paste the Bunny GUID)
modules.onboardingStep3: 3️⃣ When ready, set a price and publish from the "Sales" card →
modules.newModulePlaceholder: Title of the new module (Enter to save)

enrollments.title: 👥 Enrolled users
enrollments.subtitle: Who purchased the course, progress status and revocations. Email/name credentials come from the customer account; revoking access blocks it on the next player request.

createHint.label: How it works:
createHint.text: after creating the course you can add modules and lessons. Videos remain on Bunny — here you only paste each video's GUID (find it in the Bunny Stream panel).

bunnyManager.defaultHint: Lessons without an explicit library use the default library. Change the default by clicking ⭐ on the library you want to promote.

empty.title: Configure Bunny Stream to enable courses
empty.text: Connect your first Bunny library. You can add more at any time if you have more than one.

legacy.title: You are using the legacy Bunny configuration (1 library)
legacy.text: Promote to multi-library to add more Bunny libraries. The current library remains functional and becomes the "default". The operation is reversible.

form.aliasHint: Internal name to recognize this library in the admin. Renamable at any time.
form.aliasRequired: Enter a name (alias) for the library
form.credsRequired: Library ID and API key are mandatory
form.tokenLabelEdit: Token Authentication Key (leave to keep unchanged)
form.tokenLabelCreate: Token Authentication Key (required to play videos)
form.tokenHint: Different from API Key. Find it in Bunny → Stream → your library → API tab, field Token Authentication Key. Without it, customers see "This content is blocked".
form.testCredsRequired: Enter Library ID and API key to test

toasts.migrateConfirm: Do you want to promote the current Bunny configuration to multi-library? The integration stays functional and you'll be able to add more libraries. The action is reversible until you delete the promoted library.
toasts.deleteConfirm: Remove the library "{{alias}}"? Lessons that explicitly reference it will block removal.

bunnyWidget.emptyDesc: Configure credentials to enable video playback.

enrollmentsSection.title: Enrolled
enrollmentsSection.emptyAll: No customer enrolled in this course.
enrollmentsSection.emptyHidingRevoked: No customer enrolled in this course (or all revoked).

revokeModal.title: Revoke enrollment
revokeModal.warning: The customer will lose access to the course immediately. The action is reversible by re-issuing a new order. The reason stays private (internal audit log).

salesCard.title: 💰 Sales
salesCard.subtitle: How it appears in the storefront and how it is purchased.
salesCard.productMissing: Unable to fetch the linked product. Reload the page.
salesCard.storesEmpty: No store configured. Create a store from "Stores" in the main menu.
salesCard.noneSelectedWarn: ⚠️ No store selected — the course will be visible in all stores of the org.
salesCard.storeDraftWarn: The store "{{name}}" is in draft — the landing is not yet public.
salesCard.blockerActive: The course is archived — reactivate it

pageList.title: Video courses
pageList.subtitle: Create and manage your video learning paths. Videos stay on Bunny; Retreat App manages structure, access and player.
pageList.emptyText: Create your first course: add modules, lessons and link them to the Bunny videos you already host.

toasts.moduleDeleteConfirm: Delete module "{{title}}" and all its lessons?

event.notFoundDesc: The requested occurrence does not exist or doesn't belong to your organization.
event.notVisibleWarning: ⚠ Event not visible to the public
event.statusOnlineDesc: The event is online and visible to the public.
event.statusClosedDesc: Sales are closed. The event remains visible.
event.statusCancelledDesc: Event cancelled. Not visible to the public.
event.statusOfflineDesc: The event is offline. Not visible to the public.

diagnostic.noStoreSlug: The store/organization slug is not configured (Settings → Store)
diagnostic.noEventSlug: The event slug is not set (open ✏️ Date, location and capacity)
diagnostic.statusNotPublished: Event status: "{{status}}" — set to "Online" to make it visible
diagnostic.productDisabled: The parent product is disabled — auto-fixed by setting the event Online
diagnostic.productDeactivated: The parent product is deactivated (soft-deleted) — auto-fixed by setting the event Online

actionBar.archiveBanner: 📦 Event archived — hidden from the main events list. Still accessible from here and from the Archive tab.

product.title: ✏️ Product
product.priceHint: Ignored if you have ticket tiers
product.requireDetailsDescOn: Checkout collects name + email + phone for each ticket. Each guest with an email receives their personal ticket.
product.requireDetailsDescOff: The main customer receives all tickets. Enable for events with named seating.
product.noEmailWarning: ⚠ Without email, the attendee won't receive the personal ticket.
product.attendeeFieldsSubtitle: Asked for each ticket (e.g. allergies, meal, size)

occurrence.title: ✏️ Date, location and capacity
occurrence.publishStoreFirst: ⚠ Publish a store to enable the landing page.
occurrence.slugMissingHint: Without a slug, the public landing page is not reachable.

tiers.title: Ticket tiers
tiers.emptyHint: No tiers — the event uses a single price. Add one to enable differentiated tickets.
tiers.softDeleteWarning: This tier has tickets sold. It will be disabled (soft-delete) instead of being deleted.

history.title: Compare with past events
history.subtitle: Last {{count}} editions of the same event — to understand the trend.

distribution.title: Distribution
distribution.subtitle: In which storefronts this event is visible.
distribution.noneSelected: None selected → visible in all stores

ticketsPage.headerSubtitle: Resend email, single ticket void, messages to attendees.
ticketsPage.broadcastSubtitle: Send an email to all event attendees. One email per address (if a customer has multiple tickets they only get one message).

logistics.label: Practical info
logistics.hint: How to get there, parking, dress code…

cancellation.label: Cancellation
cancellation.hint: The event has been cancelled, refund instructions.

custom.label: Custom
custom.hint: You write the entire body. First line = subject.

ticketsPage.messagePlaceholderCustom:
First line → email subject.

Message body…

Send email to all event attendees?
Template: {{template}}
ticketsPage.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, code or tier…
ticketsPage.resendNoEmail: The ticket has no email attached
ticketsPage.voidConfirm:
Void the ticket of {{name}}?

The ticket can no longer be used at check-in. The order remains valid (use the orders flow to cancel the entire order).
ticketsPage.voidedCheckedIn: Cannot void — the ticket is already checked in

checkIn.scannerUnavailableHint: Use the manual input above to enter the ticket code.

errors.insecure_context: The camera requires a secure connection (HTTPS). Open this page via https:// or use the manual input below.
errors.no_media_api: The browser does not support camera access. Use the manual input below.
errors.permission_denied: Camera permission denied. Tap the lock icon in the address bar, allow the camera, then reload.
errors.no_camera: No camera available on this device. Use manual input.
errors.camera_busy: The camera is in use by another app or tab. Close the other apps and try again.
errors.constraints_unmet: Unable to use the rear camera. Try again or use manual input.
errors.security: Camera access blocked by browser policy. Check the site settings.
errors.fallback: Camera startup error. Use the manual input below.

toasts.archiveConfirm: Archive this event? It will disappear from the main list but remain accessible from the Archive.
toasts.unarchiveConfirm: Restore this event? It will return to the main list.

content.trHint: Translate the texts only: structure, times and photos are managed in Italian. Fields left empty stay in Italian on the public page.
content.trLineHint: One line per entry, in the same order as the Italian.
content.trEmpty: Fill in the Italian content first: the same fields will appear here for translation.

createdBanner.text: Retreat created! Now build your sales page: day-by-day program, photo gallery, what's included and FAQ.

reservation.invalidTypeDesc: This page only manages products of type "rental".

pricing.flavorSlotDesc: The customer picks a date + time (meeting room, sports court).
pricing.slotDurationFallback: Default and fallback when min/step/max are empty.
pricing.variableDesc: The customer freely picks start and end (even across days). Hourly price: {{price}} €/hour × duration.

digital.statusFileMissingDesc: You can't publish until you upload the digital file.

file.title: 📁 Digital file
file.missingWarning: ⚠️ No file uploaded. The product cannot be published.
file.privacyHint: The file is stored in a private area: only the personal link generated after purchase (with every request verified by the backend) can access it.

inventory.title: 📦 Copy limit

physical.invalidTypeDesc: This page only manages products of type "physical".

physical.statusOfflineDesc: The product is offline. Not visible to the public.

inventory.title: 📦 Inventory
inventory.trackStockDesc: The backend decrements the quantity atomically on each confirmed order and restores it on cancel.

fulfillment.title: 🚚 Delivery
fulfillment.notesPlaceholder: E.g. Shipping only within Italy · Pickup Tue–Fri 10–18

terms.title: 📜 Terms & conditions
terms.hint: Returns, warranty, shipping — specific to this product. If empty, the store's T&C are used.

service.invalidTypeDesc: This page only manages products of type "service".

service.statusOfflineDesc: The service is offline. Not visible to the public.
service.upcomingEmpty: No appointments scheduled. Customers can book from the landing page.

- First assessment
- Guided hypnosis session
- Email follow-up
service.calendarDesc: The service is bookable on every free slot in your calendar. Block any time you don't want available directly from the calendar.
service.calendarFilterHint: Unavailable slots are filtered based on calendar blocks.
service.optionsSubtitle: The customer picks exactly one at checkout. If you don't set options, the base price is used.
service.distributionDesc: Where the service is visible to customers.

service.orderFieldsSubtitle: Asked once during the order (e.g. describe the issue, profession)

product.coverPlaceholder: Hero image URL of the public page

product.allowCustomHint: In addition to slots computed from availability.

common.imageUploadFailed: Product created, but image upload failed.
common.termsHint: If empty, the store's general terms are used.

draft.title: Unsaved draft available
draft.subtitle: You started filling out a form {{ago}} ago. Resume or start over?

unsaved.title: Unsaved changes
unsaved.message: If you leave now you will lose the data you entered. Leave anyway?

sku.takenHint: This SKU is already used by another product. Please choose a different one.

imageUpload.failed: Image upload failed. The product was created but without an image.

identity.namePlaceholder: E.g. Logo t-shirt / Extra-virgin olive oil 750ml / Soldering kit

pricing.title: Price & stock
pricing.subtitle: Base price per unit. Track stock if availability is limited.
pricing.trackStockDesc: On: the backend decrements the quantity on each confirmed order and blocks orders when inventory is exhausted. Off: the product is always available.

fulfillment.title: Delivery options
fulfillment.subtitle: The methods (shipping / pickup) are managed at the store level. Here you can add notes specific to this product.
fulfillment.noStores: No store configured. Go to Store to enable shipping or pickup.
fulfillment.shipping: Shipping — the customer enters the address at checkout.
fulfillment.localPickup: Local pickup — the customer comes to collect the product.
fulfillment.modesHint: To change them, edit the store settings.
fulfillment.notesPlaceholder: E.g. Shipping only within Italy · Pickup by appointment Tue–Fri 10–18
fulfillment.notesHint: Shown to the customer in the order confirmation and update emails.

publish.termsPlaceholder: Returns, warranty, shipping policies specific to this product…
publish.distributionDesc: Where the product will be visible to customers.
publish.distributionMultiDesc: In which stores the product is visible.
publish.publishToggleDesc: The product becomes visible and purchasable on the public storefront. If off, it is saved as a draft.

event.title: New event
event.duplicateBanner: 🧬 Based on <0>{{source}}</0> — check the date and publish when you're ready.

validation.endAfterStart: End must be after the start
validation.capacityWarning: The sum of tier capacities ({{tierSum}}) exceeds total capacity ({{occCap}}). Total capacity takes priority: extra tickets will NOT be sellable.
validation.uploadFailedSuffix: Event created, but upload of {{which}} failed. You can add it from the Edit panel.

base.title: What you offer
base.subtitle: Main event information.
base.namePlaceholder: E.g. Dinner at the Masseria — autumn edition
base.descriptionPlaceholder: 1–2 lines that appear on the catalog card.
base.imageHint: Used in the catalog and as a fallback for the landing page.
base.priceHint: Only used if you don't create ticket tiers in step 3.
base.categoryHint: Determines where it appears in the public retreats calendar.

where.title: When and where
where.subtitle: Date, time, capacity and event location.
where.coordsHint: Paste coordinates from Google Maps (right-click → "What's here?"). Not required, but unlocks the map on the landing page.
where.coverUrlPlaceholder: or paste a URL… (empty = use product image)

tickets.requireDetailsDescOn: At checkout the customer enters details for each attendee. Each guest with an email receives their own personal ticket.
tickets.requireDetailsDescOff: The main customer receives all tickets. Enable this option for events with named seating (dinner, course, concert).
tickets.noEmailWarning: ⚠ Without email, the attendee won't receive the personal ticket (they stay in the main customer's summary email).
tickets.attendeeFieldsSubtitle: Asked for each ticket (e.g. allergies, meal type, t-shirt size)
tickets.attendeeFieldsEmpty: No additional fields. Add fields to collect custom info on each attendee.
tickets.orderFieldsSubtitle: Asked once at checkout (e.g. company, VAT)
tickets.orderFieldsEmpty: No order fields. Add fields to collect custom info at order level.
tickets.tiersSubtitle: More tiers = more choice. Empty? The event sells at the step 1 base price.
tickets.noTiersDescWithPrice: The event will use the base price of {{price}} €.
tickets.noTiersDescNoPrice: The event will use the base price from … (step 1).

publish.longDescDescPrefix: What appears on the event landing page. Markdown supported:
publish.longDescPlaceholder:
## The concept

Intimate evening with a 4-course tasting menu…

## What's included

- Welcome aperitif
- Wine pairing
- Live music
publish.termsDesc: If you fill in this field, the customer will have to accept these specific terms at checkout. If empty, the store-level terms are used (if enabled). Markdown supported.
publish.termsPlaceholder:
## Rules

- No entry under 18
- No video recording
- No refunds within 72h of the event
publish.distributionDesc: Where the event will be visible to customers.
publish.distributionMultiDesc: In which stores the event is visible.
publish.publishToggleDesc: If checked, the event is visible in the catalog and purchasable. You can always change this from the event dashboard.
publish.validationErrorBanner: Some previous fields need attention. Go back to fix them.
publish.enrichLaterCue: Here you create the retreat with the essentials. The day-by-day program, photo gallery and FAQ come RIGHT AFTER: on save we take you to the retreat page, "Sales page" section.

program.title: Program and sales page
program.subtitle: Day-by-day program, what's included and FAQ. You can also complete them later, from the retreat page.

identity.namePlaceholder: E.g. Ebook 'Cashflow guide' / Excel template / Audio course

pricing.title: Price & availability
pricing.subtitle: Enable tracking only if you want to limit the number of sellable copies (e.g. 100 downloads total).
pricing.trackStockDesc: On: the counter decreases by 1 on each confirmed order and blocks new orders at 0. Off: the product is always purchasable.

file.title: File to deliver
file.subtitle: Upload the file that will be delivered to the customer. It is stored in a protected area and distributed only via a personal link after purchase.
file.placeholder: Choose file (PDF, ZIP, audio, video, archives… max 100 MB)
file.privacyHint: 🔒 The file is never served publicly. It is delivered only via the personal link generated after payment and verified by the backend on every access.

policy.title: Access policy
policy.subtitle: Optional rules applied to the customer's personal link.
policy.longDescPlaceholder: Supports **markdown**. E.g. table of contents, preview of what the customer gets.

range.label: Period rental
range.desc: The customer rents over a date range. Ideal for B&Bs, rooms, cars, equipment.
range.example: B&B double room · €90/night · calendar blocked day by day.

slot.desc: The customer rents a specific time slot. Ideal for rooms, sports courts, bookable spaces.
slot.example: Meeting room A · €20/hour · 2 hours bookable from 10 to 12.

flavor.title: Rental type
flavor.subtitle: How do your customers book this product?

pricing.title: Price & unit
pricing.subtitleRange: Base price per rental unit. Extras will be added to the total.
pricing.subtitleSlot: Base price per slot. Extras will be added to the total.
pricing.slotDurationHint: Used as the default duration and as a fallback if you don't fill in min/step/max.
pricing.variableDescPrefix: The customer freely picks start and end (even across days) respecting these constraints. The price is
pricing.notesPlaceholder: E.g. Pickup at 10 · Drop-off at 18 · Deposit €100

when.title: Availability
when.subtitleRange: For period rentals, availability comes from the calendar: the system blocks booked days. You can add manual blocks (holidays, downtime) from the Calendar page after creating the product.
when.subtitleSlot: Define the weekly time bands when the slot is bookable. The customer will only see free slots on the calendar.
when.useStoreCalendarDesc: Reuses the weekly rules already configured at the store level (official opening hours). Uncheck to set custom rules only for this booking.
when.storeCalendarHint: ℹ️ Slots will be generated from your store's calendar. If you need to set specific hours only for this booking, uncheck the box above.
when.rangeNoRulesHint: ℹ️ No rules needed for now. Each confirmed booking will automatically create a calendar block for the dates picked by the customer.

publish.termsPlaceholder: Cancellation, deposits, policies specific to this product…

publish.publishToggleDesc: The product becomes visible and bookable on the public storefront. If off, it is saved as a draft.

validation.durationRange: Duration must be between 5 and 1440 minutes
validation.ruleNotCreated: Availability rule for day {{day}} not created

when.useDefaultDesc: The service is bookable on every free slot in your calendar. Block any time you don't want available directly from the calendar.
when.useDefaultHint: 💡 Turn this off only if you want to set hours that are exclusive to this service.

publish.longDescDesc: What appears on the public service page. Markdown supported.
publish.longDescPlaceholder:
## What's included

- Free first assessment
- Guided hypnosis session (60 min)
- Email follow-up in the days after

## Who it's for 

People who want to improve sleep quality, quit smoking, manage anxiety.
publish.coverUrlPlaceholder: https://… hero image of the public page

publish.distributionMultiDesc: In which stores the service is visible.
publish.termsDesc: Override for this service. If empty, the store's terms are used. Markdown supported.

## Privacy and consent

- By proceeding you accept data processing per the privacy policy
- No refunds within 48h of the session
publish.orderFieldsSubtitle: Asked once during the order (e.g. profession, company, describe the issue)

publish.allowCustomDesc: In addition to computed slots, the customer can propose a free time slot that you confirm manually.

## The concept

A tasting evening with a 4-course menu and live music…

multilang.visibility: The product will appear in views in these languages. Without a translation it stays visible in Italian only.
multilang.sectionHint: The Italian text is the placeholder in each field. Languages with a filled description are the languages where the product is visible; empty fields stay in Italian.
